name: node-source-map-support
title: node-source-map-support
summary: Fixes stack traces for files with source maps
description:
Fixes stack traces for files with source maps
This module uses source-map to replace the paths and line numbers
of source-mapped files with their original counterparts in the real
sources.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-source-map-support because Fixes stack traces for files with source maps.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-source-map-support as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-source-map-support with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-source-map-support --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
